scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix NeuraBot" "npm run dev --prefix DashBoard"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix NeuraBot && npm run build --prefix DashBoard
scripts.predeploy: npm run build && rimraf dist && mkdirp dist && cpy "NeuraBot/dist/**" dist --dot && mkdirp dist/dashboard && cpy "DashBoard/dist/**" dist/dashboard --dot && echo neurabot.com.br > dist/CNAME
